creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Mon Aug 19 08:39:31 2013
New Revision: 324956
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/324956

Log:
  - Update to 3.5
  - While I'm here:
    - Update USE_PYTHON
    - Use PORTDOCS
    - Sort MAN3
  
  Changes:	https://github.com/collective/icalendar/blob/master/CHANGES.rst
  PR:		ports/181370
  Submitted by:	Junji NAKANISHI <jun-g@daemonfreaks.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/py-icalendar/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-icalendar/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-icalendar/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/py-icalendar/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-icalendar/Makefile	Mon Aug 19 08:36:13 2013	(r324955)
+++ head/devel/py-icalendar/Makefile	Mon Aug 19 08:39:31 2013	(r324956)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	icalendar
-PORTVERSION=	3.3
+PORTVERSION=	3.5
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
@@ -15,16 +15,17 @@ LICENSE=	BSD
 RUN_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}dateutil>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dateutil \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}pytz>0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-pytz
 
-USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYTHON=	-2.7
 USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
 
 DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/py-${PORTNAME}
+PORTDOCS=	*
 
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 post-install:
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}/
 	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/README.rst ${WRKSRC}/docs/changelog.rst ${DOCSDIR}/
 .endif
